title: Phase 6 T0 — author Phase 6 plan doc
predecessor: Phase 5 COMPLETE (v1.1.0, 2026-04-20). M35 T10 shipped the Phase 5 exit-gate marker: CLAUDE.md Phase 5 literal flipped 'in progress' → 'complete'; design doc §9 M35 row flipped 📋 → ✅; CONTINUITY.md Phase 5 COMPLETE header prepended; docs/user-guide/demo-walkthrough.md promoted external; +3 unit release-marker tests (1166 → 1169). Full Phase 5 exit verification green: 1169/1169 vitest + 12/12 Playwright + typecheck clean + 0 lint errors / 24 warnings + production build. v1.1.0 git tag on the T10 ledger commit.
goal: First Phase 6 task. Author docs/plans/2026-0X-XX-team-x-phase-6-<theme>.md using the Phase 5 design doc (docs/plans/2026-04-13-team-x-phase-5-intelligence-layer.md) as the structural template. Required sections: Overview, What ships (bullet list of headline capabilities), Invariants preserved (map to the 11 architectural invariants in CLAUDE.md — call out any new ones), Success criteria, Milestone breakdown (§9 table placeholder — M36 onwards, status 📋 Planned for all rows at T0), Acceptance criteria (ABI rebuild dance, atomic + ledger commit cadence, source-string-audit test lineage), Decisions log scaffold (copy D1–D14 from Phase 5 as baseline carry-forward; new decisions get D15+ IDs). Scope selection MUST be explicit — do not default-pick. The Phase 5 retrospective §6 enumerates 7 candidate themes with rationale + estimated size: (1) post-release telemetry digest for evidence-based default tuning, (2) cross-company copilot rollups, (3) proactive copilot → autonomous action, (4) agent-to-agent negotiation, (5) capabilities frontmatter on role.md, (6) real customer demo, (7) insight export. Pick ONE headline theme (or combine two if they share an evidence backbone). Zero code / zero tests / zero IPC/bus/migrations in T0 — plan-doc-only deliverable, mirrors Phase 5 M28 T0.
acceptance: Plan doc lives at docs/plans/2026-0X-XX-team-x-phase-6-<theme>.md with date stamp ≥ 2026-04-20

Structural mirror of docs/plans/2026-04-13-team-x-phase-5-intelligence-layer.md: Overview, What ships, Invariants preserved, Success criteria, Milestone breakdown (§9 table), Acceptance criteria, Decisions log scaffold
Theme selection is explicit — the plan doc §1 Overview names the chosen theme + links to the Phase 5 retrospective §6 seed row as justification
Milestone breakdown table has at least 3 rows (M36 onwards) with status 📋 Planned for all — scope of each is left as TBD until its plan-doc task lands later in Phase 6
Decisions log §13 carries forward D1–D14 verbatim as baseline; any new Phase 6 decisions land as D15+ with status 'Locked (<date>)'
Invariants §: reiterate the 11 CLAUDE.md invariants explicitly; call out any new invariants introduced by the Phase 6 theme with a rationale
Zero code / zero tests / zero IPC/bus/migrations — plan-doc-only per the Phase 5 M28 T0 precedent
CLAUDE.md Status section: add a Phase 6 — in progress bullet after the Phase 5 complete line
filesTouched: .loki/state/orchestrator.json (set currentPhase = 'DEVELOPMENT', currentMilestone = null, phase = 'Phase 6 — <theme>', phaseComplete = false, history.Phase5 rolled up with verificationGates)
.loki/queue/pending.json (initialise Phase 6 scaffold with T0 as the only shipped task)
.loki/CONTINUITY.md (prepend Phase 6 T0 SHIPPED header after the Phase 5 COMPLETE section)
notes: Phase 5 is complete and v1.1.0 is tagged. This is the first Phase 6 task. Read .loki/CONTINUITY.md top section (Phase 5 COMPLETE) for full context before starting.

Theme selection is the single biggest design decision of T0. Do not default-pick — read the Phase 5 retrospective §6 and weigh all 7 candidates explicitly. Ideally bring Rocky into the loop on theme choice before drafting.

Patterns to carry forward: atomic + ledger commit cadence, three-tier canned test seam (quartet), pause-aware providerRouter wrapper, source-string-audit lineage, ABI rebuild dance, is_system filter sweep, invariant #11, locked retrospective structure.
After T0 ships, Phase 6 T1+ tasks materialise based on which theme is chosen. Do NOT pre-author T1+ in T0.
